name: Verdant Systems
description: Developing proprietary next-generation carbon capture technology utilizing engineered mycelium networks. Verdant's pilot facility demonstrates a 40% reduction in operational energy costs compared to direct air capture alternatives.

name: Axiom Ledger
description: Institutional-grade reconciliation engine for decentralized finance assets. Axiom automates complex tax reporting and compliance frameworks for Tier 1 banks entering the digital asset ecosystem.

name: NeuroSync
description: Non-invasive brain-computer interface wearables for early detection of neurological decline. Patented sensor array provides clinical-grade data mapping integrated with a physician-facing predictive analytics dashboard.

name: Quantum Core
description: Photonic chip architecture designed specifically for running large language models at the edge. Quantum Core dramatically reduces thermal output and energy consumption for localized AI inference tasks.
